provenance: beat-n capacity-max hand ladder point (2026-07-18 Nano session): the allocator's internal act predictor over-estimates ~14% so its fence saturates at honest act ~240 while the measured bar crossing sits at ~275; this spec spends the measured margin. Probe ONNX (l2-pruned random-weight graph) benched weight-free on the Nano BEFORE any recovery: fp32 11.62 / fp16 6.781 median-of-3 fresh-cache, mode 0, locked clocks, docker-ps-empty (data/e2e/probe_s39d_cap_a_640*.json). Sibling capc2 (act 275.3, 1,998,795 params) measured fp32 12.63 (bar margin 0.11 ms) but its fp16 engine failed to build twice under board memory pressure - retired.
note: latency claims are measured-only; act figures are the post-yolo_tp_prep split currency (PHYSICAL_DENSE_PRUNED_* laws over-predict ~0.6-0.9 ms in the 230-250 band, conservative direction).
